description: Classifier ground-truth — Sprint 2026-05-11. 10 samples covering DE/UK/PL/UA/CZ. Curated by inspecting source notices in relevant.json + cross-checking the existing AI labels (_trailer_type_1_ai, _trailer_quantity_1_ai). Negative case (UA dump truck) is the explicit anti-pattern: 'mounted on truck chassis' = NOT a trailer.

samples.label: DE-BAAINBw-CargoTrailers
samples.notes: Two-variant frame agreement: 4600 × 3.5t + 5100 × 12.5t. Quantity recorded as primary slot only (4600). Both variants are clearly military cargo trailers.

samples.label: DE-BAAINBw-2WheelTrailers
samples.notes: 7-year frame agreement, up to 480 units, 2-wheeled / 1-ton / military. Cleanly identified as defence trailer in the title.

samples.label: UK-CommandoCraftTrailers
samples.notes: UK Defence award, no explicit unit count in source — quantity correctly null.

samples.label: UK-RTO-TractorTrailer

ground_truth.trailer_type: Heavy-duty flat-bed trailer with ISO container twist-lock

samples.notes: 1 trailer + 1 tractor for the RTO Group (Royal Tank-Operations). Quantity 1 explicit. Tractor is a non-trailer item — would normally land in additional_equipment.

samples.label: PL-MOD-TransportTrailers
samples.notes: PL MOD frame agreement, three capacity classes. No firm-quantity figure visible in the description.

samples.label: PL-12WOG-HighCapTrailers
samples.notes: Base quantity 4, option up to 8. Award notice — winner Zasław. Quantity 4 (firm) is the canonical value.

samples.label: UA-CarTrailers
samples.notes: Ukrainian Defence procurement of 16 car trailers. Quantity explicitly stated in description.

samples.label: UA-DumpTruck-NEGATIVE
samples.notes: Critical negative case: dump truck mounted on a 6×4 automobile chassis. Truck-with-bed, NOT a trailer. The classifier MUST reject this with relevant=false.

samples.label: CZ-MOD-SmallScaleTrailers
samples.notes: Czech MOD small-scale procurement, type unspecified in the body text. Trailer-type generic fallback is acceptable; quantity correctly null.

samples.label: CZ-VOPCZ-LowBedSemi

ground_truth.trailer_type: Low-bed semi-trailer for heavy military equipment transport

samples.notes: VOP CZ (Czech defence enterprise) acquisition of a podvalník. Strong defence + clear trailer subject. No firm unit count.
